seo_title: All Sports | Los Cab Sports Club — Basketball, Swimming, Volleyball & More
seo_description: Los Cab Sports Club offers swimming, basketball, volleyball, handball, squash, racquetball, badminton, and water polo programs in Fountain Valley, CA.
hero_subtitle: One membership — unlimited sport options. Explore every sport and activity we offer at Los Cab Sports Club.

featured_sports.label: Aquatic Center
featured_sports.title: Swimming
featured_sports.subtitle: Our heated 50-meter Olympic-size pool is among the finest in Orange County. Ideal for lap swimming, cross-training, lessons, or a refreshing workout in the sun.

features.title: 50-Meter Olympic Pool
features.text: Heated year-round for comfortable swimming in any season.

features.title: Nova Swim School
features.text: Professional swim lessons for children and adults at all skill levels.

features.title: Aqua Fitness Classes
features.text: Low-impact water-based fitness classes included with membership.

features.title: 6-8 Water Polo Academy
features.text: Structured youth water polo development for players ages 6–8.

features.title: Wading & Specialty Pools
features.text: Separate pools for younger swimmers and specialized aquatic activities.

featured_sports.label: Indoor Court
featured_sports.title: Basketball
featured_sports.subtitle: Los Cab features a full-size indoor basketball court that converts to two half-courts. Open gym is available daily, with organized programs led by Coach Beez.

features.title: Full-Size Indoor Court
features.text: Converts to 2 half-courts for simultaneous games. Climate-controlled facility.

features.title: Daily Open Gym
features.text: Open gym available each morning and evening. Note: closed Mon–Fri 3–9 PM for volleyball.

features.title: Coached by Coach Beez
features.text: Organized basketball programs, drills, and skills sessions with experienced coaching.

featured_sports.label: Indoor & Outdoor
featured_sports.title: Volleyball
featured_sports.subtitle: Los Cab is home to United Volleyball Club and offers both indoor and outdoor play. The indoor basketball court is converted for volleyball Mon–Fri evenings.

features.title: United Volleyball Club
features.text: Home club to United Volleyball — organized competitive volleyball programming.

features.title: Indoor Volleyball
features.text: Mon–Fri 3–9 PM on the converted basketball/volleyball court.

features.title: Outdoor Play
features.text: Outdoor volleyball courts available for open play and organized events.

other_sports.title: Handball — 8 Courts
other_sports.desc: Los Cab features 8 handball courts with both concrete and glass walls — one of the premier handball facilities in Southern California. We regularly host national-level handball tournaments.

other_sports.title: Squash
other_sports.desc: High-intensity squash play available at Los Cab. Orientation lessons available from our squash professional Sam Daye — perfect for newcomers and experienced players alike.

other_sports.title: Racquetball — 7 Courts
other_sports.desc: Seven glass-back walled racquetball courts provide excellent visibility and play. Open play available throughout the day for all skill levels.

other_sports.title: Badminton — Relaunching July 2026
other_sports.desc: The Los Cab badminton program is relaunching in July 2026 under the direction of Michael Do. Stay tuned for clinic schedules, leagues, and open play sessions.
